mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO area_avg ( price_date, area_code, area_name, oil_category, avg_price, created_at ) VALUES
( STR_TO_DATE(#{chart.priceDate}, '%Y%m%d'), 0, '전국', #{chart.oilCategory}, #{chart.avgPrice}, NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avg_price = VALUES(avg_price), created_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO area_avg ( price_date, area_code, area_name, oil_category, avg_price, created_at ) VALUES
( STR_TO_DATE(#{chart.priceDate}, '%Y%m%d'), #{chart.areaCode}, #{chart.areaName}, #{chart.oilCategory}, #{chart.avgPrice}, NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avg_price = VALUES(avg_price), created_at = NOW()
